step_ar: Add the chicken broth and bouillon to a large pot. Heat on high until boiling
step_en: Add the chicken broth and bouillon to a large pot. Heat on high until boiling

step_ar: Mix and allow the leaves to melt completely and come to a boil again
step_en: Mix and allow the leaves to melt completely and come to a boil again

step_ar: In a small frying pan, melt the butter on medium heat\n
step_en: In a small frying pan, melt the butter on medium heat

step_ar: Add the minced garlic, salt and pepper. Fry the garlic in the butter for about 2-3 minutes until lightly browned
step_en: Add the minced garlic, salt and pepper. Fry the garlic in the butter for about 2-3 minutes until lightly browned

step_ar: Pour the garlic mixture into the pot with the molokhia
step_en: Pour the garlic mixture into the pot with the molokhia

step_ar: Mix well and let the molokhia boil for another 2-3 minutes before turning off heat
step_en: Mix well and let the molokhia boil for another 2-3 minutes before turning off heat

step_ar: Serve with rice and chicken. Enjoy!
step_en: Serve with rice and chicken. Enjoy!

step_en: Add the frozen molokhia leaves to the boiling pot

step_ar: Mix and allow the leaves to melt completely and come to a boil again
step_en: Mix and allow the leaves to melt completely and come to a boil again

step_ar:
• 1 كيس بروكلي مجمد
  • 1 ملعقة كبيرة زبدة
  • 1 ملعقة كبيرة زيت نباتي
  • 1 مكعب ثوم مفروم مجمد
  • 4 أكواب من المرق/ الشوربة
  • 1 كوب كريمة الطبخ
  • ملح الطعام وفلفل أسود
  • 1 ملعقة كبيرة كركم
step_en:
• 1 pack of frozen Broccoli
  • 1 table spoons of butter
  • 1 table spoon of vegetables oil
  • 1 frozen minced garlic cubes
  • 4 cups of Broth
  • 1 cup of cooking cream
  • Table salt and pepper
  • 1 table spoons of turmeric

step_ar:
• 1 كيس خرشوف مجمد
  • 2/1 كيس بصل مبشور مجمد
  • 1 ملعقة كبيرة زبدة
  • 1 ملعقة كبيرة زيت نباتي
  • 2 ملعقة كبيرة من الدقيق
  • 2 ملعقة كبيرة عصير ليمون
  • 4 أكواب مرقة/ شوربة
  • 1 كوب كريمة طهى
  • ملح
  • فلفل أسود
step_en:
• 1 pack of frozen artichoke
  • ½ pack of frozen grated onion
  • 1 table spoons of butter
  • 1 table spoon of vegetable oil
  • 2 table spoons of flour
  • 2 table spoons of lemon juice
  • 4 cups of broth
  • 1 cup of cooking cream
  • Salt
  • Pepper
